title: Follow up with Samsung periodically to keep relationship warm
description: From Otter recording: Samsung-Mountain Business Meeting (May 15, 2026). Samsung corporate dev team expressed interest in staying in touch and wants to be included if MNTN starts a strategic or capital raise process. No hard commitments but both sides agreed to periodic check-ins.

comments.text: Checking back in June to see if their TV strategy has been solidified by new GM.

title: Stagwell Deal
description: Sign a major commitment to boost media spend this quarter. Met with their team last week to reset the relationship. Full demo with their teams this week. New leadership (all previous contacts were laid off 4 months ago) were not aware of the platform. Positive early signal.

comments.text: Met with their team last week to reset the relationship. Full demo / dog and pony show with their teams this week. New leadership not aware of our platform or features. I'm positive on this.

title: MNTN Board Meeting reminder — Q3 (Oct 27)
description: Q3 MNTN Quarterly Board Meeting is 45 days away (October 27, 2026 at Latham & Watkins, Century City). Begin prep. Schedule pre-board alignment call with Mark, Patrick, and Ashley Graham 30 days before (by September 27).
